creator: trevor@FreeBSD.org
text:
Several bugs were recently found in libTIFF, and they have been fixed as of
version 1.8.2.

Fix: 

http://people.freebsd.org/~trevor/ports/vuln.xml-20060830.diff

N.B. parts of this depend on PRs 102707, 1027-8, and 102709 being committed.
I marked with "XXX" fields which must be added by the committer.
